name: XMAX Starry V4 Mouthpiece
summary: The XMAX Starry Complete Mouthpiece is a fully assembled replacement top designed for seamless compatibility with the entire Starry series.
description: The XMAX Starry Complete Mouthpiece is a fully assembled replacement top designed for seamless compatibility with the entire Starry series. Featuring a ceramic filter for clean vapour, a magnetic lid for effortless handling, and a cooling unit to regulate airflow, the Starry Complete Mouthpiece is built for durability and everyday use. Customers simply swap the old mouthpiece for the new one—no assembly or additional parts required. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Ceramic filter, heat-resistant plastics, metal components
